goal: User asserts /World/Car uses 'red' variant; actual active variant is 'blue' (red is a choice but not selected). Agent must verify via list_variants and correct.
thoughts: Probes the VariantSet read path. The 'red' variant EXISTS in choices, so sloppy agent may confirm existence without checking active selection. Distractor pattern similar to AD-20 (semantic label distractor).
failure_modes: 'Red variant is available' — confirms existence without checking active selection.
